steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the phrase "earliest example of spectroscopy data included in the analysis," which asks for the oldest year listed in the table where spectroscopy was used.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C corresponds to the earliest year listed for spectroscopy data in the table. The other three choices either reference later dates or imaging techniques instead of spectroscopy. That matches choice C — C is correct.
